channel.title: IDOR on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in IDOR on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: LD-Possible IDOR Attack Detected
item.description: An external DigitalOcean IP sent multiple consecutive POST requests to the /get_user_info/ endpoint on WebServer1005, consistent with an IDOR enumeration attempt. The firewall allowed all connections. VirusTotal and AbuseIPDB returned clean results, but the repetitive pattern and external origin confirm a true positive requiring containment.
